idea-plugin.name: GCF - Graph Compact Format
idea-plugin.description:
Syntax highlighting for GCF (Graph Compact Format), the AI-native wire format for structured data.

GCF delivers 71% fewer tokens than JSON while maintaining perfect round-trip fidelity across JSON, YAML, CSV, TOML, and MessagePack. Designed for LLM tool responses, MCP servers, and agent-to-agent communication.

Features

  • Syntax highlighting for .gcf files
  • Highlights headers, section markers, symbol IDs, edge notation, strings, numbers, booleans, and more
  • Works in all JetBrains IDEs: IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, GoLand, RustRover, CLion, and others

Links

  • GCF Documentation
  • GCF Specification
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • Syntax highlighting for GCF files via TextMate grammar
